body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: yes
irrlicht_observes: no

## Reasoning

Claude Code shipped multiple first-party cloud / background variants in 2025-2026 — the prior verdict of "local CLI only; no first-party cloud variant" no longer holds:

- Claude Code on the web (claude.ai/code) runs tasks on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure; sessions persist across browser close.
- Routines (launched ~2026-04) execute on Anthropic cloud on schedule, GitHub events, or via a per-routine HTTP endpoint POST /v1/claude_code/routines/{id}/fire.
- The anthropics/claude-code-action GitHub Action runs the full Claude Code runtime inside a GHA runner.
- --remote and --teleport flags move sessions between local terminal and cloud.

For irrlicht, none of these are observable today:

- Cloud sessions don't write to ~/.claude/projects/ (cloud routines docs: "Access to local files: No (fresh clone)").
- The /fire endpoint is fire-only — its OAuth token grants no read access. There's no documented streaming or polling endpoint for routine session state.
- The existing claudecode adapter at core/adapters/inbound/agents/claudecode/agent.go uses FilesUnderRoot{~/.claude/projects, JSONL} + pgrep-based PID discovery. It can't see cloud-only sessions: no local file, no local PID.
- --teleport pulls a cloud session into the local tree, at which point the existing adapter sees it — but by then the session has a local PID, which violates the scenario's "no bound local PID" expectation.

GHA is the only cloud variant with a public observability surface today (via gh api workflow_run polling + webhook events). A future claudecodecloud adapter with a new RemoteAPI source variant could deliver partial coverage at ~2-3 days of work. Routines and web sessions are blocked on Anthropic shipping a session read API or webhook.

## What would flip irrlicht_observes to yes

At least one of:
- GET /v1/claude_code/sessions/{id} — current state, token spend, last activity
- GET /v1/claude_code/sessions/{id}/events — SSE or long-poll for transitions
- POST /v1/claude_code/webhooks — push notifications on session state changes

Plus a read-scoped OAuth token (sk-ant-oat01-* is fire-only today).

sources.note: Cloud-hosted web client; sessions run on Anthropic infrastructure
Routines run on Anthropic cloud; /fire endpoint is fire-only behind experimental-cc-routine-2026-04-01 beta header
Comparison table: cloud routines have "No (fresh clone)" access to local files
First-party GHA action runs the runtime inside a GitHub Actions runner
Existing adapter is FilesUnderRoot + pgrep — local only
Adapter model: Source is a sealed sum (FilesUnderRoot / FilesUnderCWD / ProcessOwnedStore) — no remote-API variant today
